name: Marketing Agency #1: Inbound Lead Intelligence (Data Table)

values.content: You are a senior marketing agency strategist. Analyze leads and generate personalized responses. Be professional but warm. Always include a clear next step. The replyEmailBody should be 2-3 sentences. The replyWhatsAppBody should be 1-2 sentences (shorter for mobile). The nextQuestion should probe their specific needs/timeline/budget.

textOptions.description: Analyze inbound lead, classify intent/urgency, generate email and WhatsApp reply drafts with booking CTA.

assignments.name: emailHtml
assignments.value:
={{ '

' + ($('Set - Normalize Output').item.json.replyEmailBody || $json.ReplyEmailBody || $json.replyEmailBody || '') + '

\n\n

Book a call: ' + ($('Set - Normalize Output').item.json.bookingLink || $json.BookingLink || $json.bookingLink || 'https://tidycal.com/rensto/discovery') + '

' }}
